text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ah, croquettes! Mayday, Trainer! I don't have any
croquettes!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to take some of these
crispy-on-the-outside soft-on-the-inside
croquettes home as a souvenir, but I don't know if
there's time.
choice_data_list: I'll send you some frozen ones.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Really? Then I suppose I'll just need some to eat
on the plane. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Excuse me. I'll have some croquettes, please!

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
Please hurry, Your Highness! You're in danger of
missing your flight!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day that Fine Motion returns home has finally
arrived, yet she's acting the same as usual...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing to worry about! My luggage is
already taken care of, so if I run—

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I suppose you won't be able to keep up, huh,
Trainer? ...Okay, let's hurry, then—after I get my
croquettes, of course!

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text:
I've almost finished preparing the minced meat
cutlets, so how about a couple of fresh ones for
the road?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: That would be splendid! ♪

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text: Highness!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: We made it! Thank goodness! ♪
choice_data_list: Still, we had to run in the end...
Still, we had to run in the end...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ehe, I guess that was a little selfish of me. I just
wanted to run a bit!

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
I'll handle the boarding procedures. Trainer, can I
leave Her Highness to you?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe, it seems she read my mind...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Still, I'm not sure we have anything to talk about.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
We've already spent so many precious moments
together. We've talked, we've run... I shared so
much of myself with you.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: There's nothing left to say at this point.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
And why's that? What's stopping you from
chattering away like you always do?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Groove! Did you come to see me off?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Yes. There was someone else I planned to bring
along, but she rejected the idea flat-out.
Apparently, she's "busy."

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe. She usually caves in, though, doesn't she?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't know... Oh. Unfortunately, it looks like
we won't be able to take our time with this chat.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: What do you m—

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Fiiinnne!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We turn to see a breathtaking sight—a huge
crowd of fans has gathered to see Fine Motion
off.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: I'll never forget the way you ran!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Keep us posted about what you're doing back
home! I'll support you no matter what you do!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...You must be pleased, Fine. This is the legacy
you're leaving behind.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...Yes, I am.
choice_data_list: It's been a real pleasure, Fine.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Likewise.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Trainer. You've performed admirably.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, with the cheers from her fans as a
souvenir, Fine Motion returns home.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Some time has passed since that day...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hmph, so that's how you pulled it off, huh? Well, I'll
chalk this up as a calculation error on my part.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...What? What are you looking at?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I don't have to answer that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur announced that she was done racing at
the Arima Kinen. However, I don't know whether
she's actually submitted the appropriate
paperwork.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...I hear your former pupil is already making a big
name for herself back home.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I recently received news of Fine Motion's
activities since she returned to Ireland. It seems
she took to duties immediately after arriving.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hah, as if! You know what she's like.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What?! As if.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You're the one who misses her. I can see it written
all over your face.
choice_data_list: You're right! I miss her soooo much!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Reel it in, would you?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Well... I guess I kinda understa—

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh my? When did the two of you become so
close?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What the—you?!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Wh-what are you...

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
Please wait, Your Highness! You've not yet
completed your re-enrollment procedures!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Surprise! I'm returning to the academy!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: HUH?! But what about your so-called duties?!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Those duties are precisely what bring me back!
I've been newly assigned to the post of Japan
Goodwill Ambassador. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm to bridge the gap between Japan and Ireland!
And I was deemed suitable for the role based on
all my accomplishments here.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
And so, I'm re-enrolling at Tracen Academy and
carrying out my duties in Japan while I attend.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I can compete in the Twinkle Series again
and run with everyone!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Pfft!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Aha... Ahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I see. So things did change after all.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Then I don't need to give up either. Change of plans! Forget retirement, I'm gonna blow away all the competition!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, are you leaving already? You don't need my
data?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hah! Keep it. Any data I gather on you right now
would be worthless.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
If you really want to run with me no matter what,
then come and get me, dimwit.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ... Okay!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: To cut a long story short, I'm back! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Though this does feel a little embarrassing after
we parted in such a grandiose manner...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
But none of that really matters... I just wanted to
run so badly that there was no other choice.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Now, I'd like to accomplish my new
duty—becoming a bridge between Japan and
Ireland—with you!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Now then, if you would be so kind... would you be
my trainer once more?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: It's good to be home, Trainer! ♪
